name: Energy Monitor
description: Tracks real-time and historical energy consumption across all monitored devices, generates reports, and identifies optimization opportunities.
author: Cocapn

onDevicePowerChange.description: Fires when a device's power draw changes by more than 10%

onAnomalyDetected.description: Fires when a device exceeds its baseline power draw by the configured anomaly threshold

onPeakRateStart.description: Fires at the configured time before peak electricity rates begin

onDailyBudgetExceeded.description: Fires when the day's cumulative energy cost exceeds the budget limit

onMonthlyReport.description: Generates a monthly energy consumption report on the configured day
